summary: Frontend-only verification of the 'Атмосфера' (Atmosphere) gallery on ArtJoga landing page. Confirmed exactly 2 gallery items with correct customer-assets URLs, no Unsplash stock images remain, section heading 'Атмосфера' and subtitle render, and both images loaded (naturalWidth > 0).
critical_code_review_comments: Gallery.jsx: data-testid is placed on the wrapper motion.div rather than the . Requirement wording implied testids identify images; tests must query the child img. Consider moving data-testid to the for clearer testability.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Atmosphere gallery contains exactly [mjqsqfi7_image.png, 4c1h06fd_image.png] as customer-assets URLs. gallery-image-{i} testid lives on wrapper div; use querySelector('img') on the wrapper to read src/naturalWidth. Lenis smooth scroll requires wheel/scrollIntoView (not window.scrollTo).

verification_details.heading: Атмосфера
verification_details.subtitle: Пространство, где практика соединяется с природой, тишиной и состоянием внутри.
